reference: Hi, first of all, I would like to know whether you are symptomatic due to this. If you are having pain in the C6-C7 dermatome, you may need surgery for this as the canal diameter is very narrow. Treatment options without surgery are: tablet Pregabalin, oral steroids, epidural steroids, neck exercises, and other pain modalities.
text: Hi. First of all, I would like to know whether you are symptomatic due to this. If you are having pain in the C6-C7 dermatomes, you may need surgery for this as the canal diameter is very narrow. Treatment options without surgery are: tablet pregabalin, oral steroids, epidural steroids, neck exercises, and other pain modalities.
